title: pelargonium × aulicum
intro: Pelargonium × aulicum, also known as the mountain geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. This plant is often used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × aulicum include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from cold and flu symptoms, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, syrup, and tincture, with the tea being a popular remedy for colds and flu due to its decongestant and expectorant properties.
